sectionOrderRules: Hero must include business type, local market or area if known, and a primary CTA.
Property summary should appear early on the page and highlight actual categories or examples of available object types without implying inventory that is not provided.
Area summary may render after property-summary to reinforce local expertise.
Trust proof must appear before the final contact-cta.
Sections should not repeat the same trust claim or CTA wording.
Properties intro must explain what kinds of objects the business works with, such as bostäder, lokaler or tomter, when such data exists.
Property list items must be concrete and based on supplied content, not fabricated listings.
If map is shown, it should support orientation and area context rather than replace the property list.
Areas intro must connect the business to local market knowledge in a factual way.
Area list should describe relevant neighborhoods, municipalities or markets that are actually served or covered.
Do not repeat identical area descriptions across multiple entries.
About story must be specific about local presence, experience or working style and avoid generic claims.
Team section should only show real people or roles provided in the dossier.
Trust proof should use available signals such as registration, reviews or market knowledge without inventing awards or totals.
Contact info must include the real contact methods supplied in the dossier.
Contact form should support general enquiries such as värdering, visning or object questions when appropriate.
Map should appear after primary contact details when address data exists.
